feed.title: Nayeem Islam
feed.subtitle: I am learning Web app security. I will share my findings here.

entry.title: Cyber Grabs CTF 2022 writeups
entry.summary: Welcome to the first post So in this post I will share a challenge walkthrough we solved at the Cyber Grabs CTF 2022’s Junior edition. Wayback 1 Some answers are hidden in the past, Whose website theme did we “cyberange.io” used when we first went public. Flag Format: flag{firstname_lastname} Solution They have told us that the answer is hidden in the past. It’s a hint to use wayback ma...
